expertise.summary: Director of Data Science with experience in machine learning, artificial intelligence, and data analysis

responsibilities: Grow and manage a world-class platform and team for rapid product research, development, deployment and improvement
Manage data scientists to help execute on strategic vision
Provide leadership in advanced engineering, data science and analytics
Collaborate with investment and client-facing teams
Maintain and update standards to assess and document modeling process and performance
Mentor junior team members and create training and growth opportunities
Provide analysis using mathematical modeling tools
Leverage data to perform intensive analysis
Assist with the mentorship and development of junior staff
Assist with the development of standardized reporting solutions
Create dashboards and reports to regularly communicate results
Designing and implementing machine learning solutions
Writing SQL or P code for cleaning the data and developing statistical models
Analyzing data with standard statistical methods
Data Engineering - building pipelines and tools for data transfer and share
Carry out tasks encompassing data cleansing and data normalization
